programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver 13
programme.desc: Another season of a show full of irony and sarcasm, hosted by John Oliver.In each episode, the host summarizes the events from the world of politics from the last week.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: The Killer's Game
programme.desc: Joe Flood, one of the best contract killers, learns about an incurable disease and places a contract on himself.However, the murderess is targeting his ex-girlfriend.Joe decides to save her.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver 13
programme.desc: Another season of a show full of irony and sarcasm, hosted by John Oliver.In each episode, the host summarizes the events from the world of politics from the last week.

programme.title: The Forgiven
programme.desc: Wealthy Londoners David (Ralph Fiennes) and Jo (Jessica Chastain) Henninger, whose marriage is in serious crisis, go to Morocco for the weekend, where they are to attend a lavish party hosted by an old friend.A man driving very fast and under the influence of alcohol fatally hits a teenager in the desert.The couple takes the body to a friend's house, where they try to cover up the incident in cooperation with the local police.However, soon the boy's father appears in the villa, demanding not only the body, but also justice.There is a violent clash of cultures, after which David will have to face the consequences of his actions.

programme.title: Shrek the Halls
programme.desc: After many dramatic adventures, Shrek dreams only of resting in the comfort of his home.However, he is not given peace.Christmas is approaching.Everyone, without exception, succumbs to the Christmas euphoria of preparing for the magical days of the year.Meanwhile, the ogre cannot surrender to the overwhelmingly solemn atmosphere because he hates holidays.However, he does not want to disappoint Fiona and the children, so he decides to get involved in the ceremonial preparations.His miserable struggles are watched by his faithful friends - Donkey, Puss in Boots and Biscuit.Embarrassed by the ogre's clumsiness and lack of good taste, they decide to help him.Soon, thanks to their efforts, Shrek's house is thrown into chaos.This promises to be the most terrifying Christmas in the life of an ogre, a lover of peace and quiet... The next adventure of Shrek in a special TV version.In the Polish language version, famous actors provided their voices, including:Jerzy Stuhr and Zbigniew Zamachowski.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: Li Fong's friend needs help.He decided to take part in a karate tournament, but his skills are insufficient.Teacher Han turns to the legendary Daniel LaRusso for help.

programme.title: Alles Fifty Fifty
programme.desc: Despite the divorce, Marion (Laura Tonke) and Andi (Moritz Bleibtreu) consider themselves exemplary parents of eleven-year-old Milan (Valentin Thatenhorst).They share custody of their son and care for him.So they are surprised when they are called to an interview at the school, during which they learn that the boy is causing a lot of problems.In this situation, they decide to take him on a holiday together to Italy.Marion's new boyfriend, Robin (David Kross), also accompanies them on the trip.Both parents quickly notice that Milan often acts like a spoiled only child, and they come to the conclusion that they need to work on raising him.The time they spend together and their shared efforts make them grow closer again.At the same time, their son falls in love for the first time.

programme.title: Rise of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: San Francisco.Will Rodman is a scientist employed by a pharmaceutical company.She is developing a formula for a drug that regenerates brain tissue that could cure his father, who suffers from Alzheimer's disease.A little chimpanzee named Caesar comes under the care of a scientist.This is where Will conducts his research.Over time, he begins to achieve success and is on the verge of a big breakthrough.He meets Caroline Aranha, who has devoted her entire life to monkeys and knows the capabilities of this species perfectly.It quickly turns out that the new drug also has side effects - it increases intelligence.Gifted with increasingly greater cognitive abilities, the chimpanzee realizes that his life means nothing to scientists.Outraged, he decides to oppose people.Caesar takes advantage of the ignorance of the facility's guards and gives samples of the drug to other chimpanzees.In a short time, all the monkeys escape from the building and start wreaking destruction in the city.The fight between intelligent monkeys for domination over humans begins.

programme.title: Ballers 3
programme.desc: Legendary American football player, Spencer Strasmore (Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson), ends his football career and starts working as a sports consultant.A comedy series that reveals the behind-the-scenes life of players of one of the most popular sports in the USA.On the one hand, the heroes live at a high standard, but on the other hand, they have to struggle with enormous pressure.The main roles were played by: Dwayne Johnson ("The Scorpion King", "Barbell and Cash"), Omar Benson Miller ("8th Mile", "The Sorcerer's Apprentice"), Rob Corddry ("Fur Tomorrow", "Forever Alive") and Taylor Cole ("Surrogates", the series "The Event").

programme.title: Ballers 3
programme.desc: Legendary American football player, Spencer Strasmore (Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson), ends his football career and starts working as a sports consultant.A comedy series that reveals the behind-the-scenes life of players of one of the most popular sports in the USA.On the one hand, the heroes live at a high standard, but on the other hand, they have to struggle with enormous pressure.The main roles were played by: Dwayne Johnson ("The Scorpion King", "Barbell and Cash"), Omar Benson Miller ("8th Mile", "The Sorcerer's Apprentice"), Rob Corddry ("Fur Tomorrow", "Forever Alive") and Taylor Cole ("Surrogates", the series "The Event").

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: USA, 1960s. Tony Vallelonga, a simple resident of the Bronx who has a wife and a group of children to support, agrees to accompany, as a chauffeur and bodyguard, a black musician - the luxurious erudite Donald Shirley - on a concert tour across the United States.Not only does he have to defend his protégé from troubles in the Deep South, but he also has to combat prejudiced views.During their journey, they both follow the instructions from the "Green Book" guide for African Americans traveling around the country.It includes, among others:suggestions on where to sleep and eat to avoid unpleasant incidents.The time spent together and overcoming mounting problems cause a surprising, lasting bond to emerge between men from different worlds.

credits.actor: George Dyer - the Cellist - Mike Hatton
Copa Coat Check Girl - Maggie Nixon

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver 13
programme.desc: Another season of a show full of irony and sarcasm, hosted by John Oliver.In each episode, the host summarizes the events from the world of politics from the last week.

programme.title: Ford v Ferrari
programme.desc: The victory in the prestigious race goes to the Ferrari team every year.Henry Ford II intends to dethrone the full-time champion.He thinks about building a car that will leave the competition behind.For this purpose, he asks for help from two specialists.One of them is the temperamental fast driving enthusiast Ken Miles.The second one is Carroll Shelby, who can boast of winning Le Mans, and some time ago, due to health problems, he gave up his driving career and took up car design.They both immediately take up the challenge, even though they know that there is a long way to achieve their goal.They quickly encounter resistance from officials.It turns out that they must immerse themselves in the world of ruthless bureaucracy to take part in the twenty-four-hour race.

programme.title: Killing the Competition
programme.desc: Bossy Elizabeth Fenwick (Melissa Joan Hart) was once the star of the cheerleading squad.Currently, the woman is very keen for her teenage daughter, Grace (Lily Brooks O'Briant), to follow in her footsteps.Unfortunately, although the girl performs very well in the team selection committee, other candidates turn out to be better and she is rejected.Elizabeth can't come to terms with it.Unable to forgive his daughter for this failure, he begins to harass her, lowering her self-esteem.Gradually, the woman's actions take the form of obsession.Finally, to ensure Grace's place in the band, she decides to expel another student from her high school, an excellent dancer named Hannah (Valerie Loo).To do this, he intends to kidnap the girl and her mother, Nicole (Anzu Lawson).Inspired by true events, the film tells the story of the obsession that a parent's unfulfilled ambition can turn into.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Harper Stern (Myha'la Herrold) moves to London from a small town in upstate New York.He takes up a job at a major international bank, Pierpoint & Co.She really wants to prove herself to her superiors and do better than her peers.However, he quickly comes face to face with the brutal reality.He discovers that in the fight for a job it is not only competence that counts, but also origin.People from privileged families have much greater opportunities.However, this does not take away from her enthusiasm and motivates her even more to try to get her dream job.Together with other graduates from his age group, he learns about the hierarchical realities of the industry.Young people fall into the ruthless corporate machine where no one trusts anyone, and everyone, regardless of ethical issues, tries to take the place of their colleagues in a better position.

programme.title: The Great
programme.desc: Catherine manages to dethrone her husband.However, he quickly learns that taking the throne is just the beginning.Now she faces a real fight to introduce significant changes in Russia.In fact, it means struggling with his own court, as well as his loved ones, including his mother (Gillian Anderson).In addition, Katarzyna will also experience love suffering.She will have to sort out her relationship with Piotr.Only all these adventures lead the powerful woman to reflect that in order to change the country, she must allow herself to be changed.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Louisiana, 2012. Two experienced detectives - Rust Cohle (Matthew McConaughey) and Martin Hart (Woody Harrelson) - have been tracking a serial killer who commits macabre ritual killings for seventeen years.During this time, their relationships have evolved, both on a professional and private level.The detectives' fates are inextricably linked, and the next installment of the most difficult case in their careers will reveal many dark secrets.The story of two Southern detectives and their dark secrets was directed by Cary Fukunaga ("Escape from Hell", "Jane Eyre").The creator of the series and the author of the script is Nic Pizzolatto.The main roles are played by Matthew McConaughey ("A Killing Time", "The Lincoln Lawyer") and Woody Harrelson ("In the Name of the Army", "Larry Flynt Scandal"). Vermilion Parish, Louisiana, 1995.Detectives Martin Hart (Woody Harrelson) and Rustin Cohle (Matthew McConaughey) investigate the ritual murder of former prostitute Dora Kelly Lange.There are mysterious symbols painted on her back, a "crown" made of deer antlers is placed on her head, and her eyes are tied with a blindfold.Her body is positioned so that it looks as if she is praying to a large, lonely tree.Next to her corpse there are numerous twigs, interwoven like in old bird cages... Cohle is convinced that Lange is not the killer's first victim, while Hart is skeptical.The investigation leads to an old case involving Marie Fontenot, a girl who disappeared five years earlier.Her case had not been previously investigated.The detectives go to see Marie's uncle, Danny (Christopher Berry).In the destroyed theater, Cohle will find twigs arranged in the same way as those he found near Lange's body... Seventeen years later, Cohle and Hart provide separate explanations about the Dora Kelly Lange case to detectives Thomas Papana (Tony Kittles) and Maynard Gilbough (Michael Potts).Hart and Cohle have not spoken since their 2002 argument.Cohle was shown a photograph of another girl whose body was found oriented in a similar manner to Lange's.Papania and Gilbough want to know how the killer could strike again if he was caught in 1995.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Louisiana, 2012. Two experienced detectives - Rust Cohle (Matthew McConaughey) and Martin Hart (Woody Harrelson) - have been tracking a serial killer who commits macabre ritual killings for seventeen years.During this time, their relationships have evolved, both on a professional and private level.The detectives' fates are inextricably linked, and the next installment of the most difficult case in their careers will reveal many dark secrets.The story of two Southern detectives and their dark secrets was directed by Cary Fukunaga ("Escape from Hell", "Jane Eyre").The creator of the series and the author of the script is Nic Pizzolatto.The main roles are played by Matthew McConaughey ("A Killing Time", "The Lincoln Lawyer") and Woody Harrelson ("In the Name of the Army", "Larry Flynt Scandal"). His superiors are pressuring Major Quesad to press charges in the murder of Dora Lange.The man warns Hart and Cohle that if they do not arrest the perpetrator quickly, the case will be handed over to a special team consisting of three investigators.Detectives ask their boss for additional time to investigate a new lead.The one from the brothel in the provinces leads them to a burnt church, where they make an important discovery.Intense work casts a shadow on the relationship between Maggie and Hart, who increasingly seeks respite away from home.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Louisiana, 2012. Two experienced detectives - Rust Cohle (Matthew McConaughey) and Martin Hart (Woody Harrelson) - have been tracking a serial killer who commits macabre ritual killings for seventeen years.During this time, their relationships have evolved, both on a professional and private level.The detectives' fates are inextricably linked, and the next installment of the most difficult case in their careers will reveal many dark secrets.The story of two Southern detectives and their dark secrets was directed by Cary Fukunaga ("Escape from Hell", "Jane Eyre").The creator of the series and the author of the script is Nic Pizzolatto.The main roles are played by Matthew McConaughey ("A Killing Time", "The Lincoln Lawyer") and Woody Harrelson ("In the Name of the Army", "Larry Flynt Scandal"). In a burned church, Cohle and Hart discover a hidden painting that leads them to the trail of preacher Joel Theriot.Members of his community tell detectives that they saw Dora Lange in the company of a tall man with a scar on his face.Although the police arrest a man whose description matches the suspect, after interrogation Cohle decides to release him, even though he is ready to plead guilty.To determine the murderer's modus operandi, the detective looks through old files.The search turns out to be fruitful - the recent murder seems very similar to the case of a woman who drowned in mysterious circumstances many years earlier.Meanwhile, Hart is surprised to learn that Maggie has set Cohle up on a date with her friend.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Louisiana, 2012. Two experienced detectives - Rust Cohle (Matthew McConaughey) and Martin Hart (Woody Harrelson) - have been tracking a serial killer who commits macabre ritual killings for seventeen years.During this time, their relationships have evolved, both on a professional and private level.The detectives' fates are inextricably linked, and the next installment of the most difficult case in their careers will reveal many dark secrets.The story of two Southern detectives and their dark secrets was directed by Cary Fukunaga ("Escape from Hell", "Jane Eyre").The creator of the series and the author of the script is Nic Pizzolatto.The main roles are played by Matthew McConaughey ("A Killing Time", "The Lincoln Lawyer") and Woody Harrelson ("In the Name of the Army", "Scandalist Larry Flynt").

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Louisiana, 2012. Two experienced detectives - Rust Cohle (Matthew McConaughey) and Martin Hart (Woody Harrelson) - have been tracking a serial killer who commits macabre ritual killings for seventeen years.During this time, their relationships have evolved, both on a professional and private level.The detectives' fates are inextricably linked, and the next installment of the most difficult case in their careers will reveal many dark secrets.The story of two Southern detectives and their dark secrets was directed by Cary Fukunaga ("Escape from Hell", "Jane Eyre").The creator of the series and the author of the script is Nic Pizzolatto.The main roles are played by Matthew McConaughey ("A Killing Time", "The Lincoln Lawyer") and Woody Harrelson ("In the Name of the Army", "Scandalist Larry Flynt").

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Louisiana, 2012. Two experienced detectives - Rust Cohle (Matthew McConaughey) and Martin Hart (Woody Harrelson) - have been tracking a serial killer who commits macabre ritual killings for seventeen years.During this time, their relationships have evolved, both on a professional and private level.The detectives' fates are inextricably linked, and the next installment of the most difficult case in their careers will reveal many dark secrets.The story of two Southern detectives and their dark secrets was directed by Cary Fukunaga ("Escape from Hell", "Jane Eyre").The creator of the series and the author of the script is Nic Pizzolatto.The main roles are played by Matthew McConaughey ("A Killing Time", "The Lincoln Lawyer") and Woody Harrelson ("In the Name of the Army", "Scandalist Larry Flynt").

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Louisiana, 2012. Two experienced detectives - Rust Cohle (Matthew McConaughey) and Martin Hart (Woody Harrelson) - have been tracking a serial killer who commits macabre ritual killings for seventeen years.During this time, their relationships have evolved, both on a professional and private level.The detectives' fates are inextricably linked, and the next installment of the most difficult case in their careers will reveal many dark secrets.The story of two Southern detectives and their dark secrets was directed by Cary Fukunaga ("Escape from Hell", "Jane Eyre").The creator of the series and the author of the script is Nic Pizzolatto.The main roles are played by Matthew McConaughey ("A Killing Time", "The Lincoln Lawyer") and Woody Harrelson ("In the Name of the Army", "Scandalist Larry Flynt").

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Louisiana, 2012. Two experienced detectives - Rust Cohle (Matthew McConaughey) and Martin Hart (Woody Harrelson) - have been tracking a serial killer who commits macabre ritual killings for seventeen years.During this time, their relationships have evolved, both on a professional and private level.The detectives' fates are inextricably linked, and the next installment of the most difficult case in their careers will reveal many dark secrets.The story of two Southern detectives and their dark secrets was directed by Cary Fukunaga ("Escape from Hell", "Jane Eyre").The creator of the series and the author of the script is Nic Pizzolatto.The main roles are played by Matthew McConaughey ("A Killing Time", "The Lincoln Lawyer") and Woody Harrelson ("In the Name of the Army", "Scandalist Larry Flynt").

programme.title: Albert Brooks: Defending My Life
programme.desc: Born in 1947, Albert Brooks is a famous actor, but also a director and screenwriter.In the film, the following people talk about working with the artist and his achievements, among others: Sharon Stone, Larry David and Jonah Hill.

programme.title: Billy Elliot: The Musical Live
programme.desc: England, mid-1980s.Eleven-year-old orphaned by his mother, Billy (Elliott Hanna) lives in a mining town.When a strike breaks out at the mine, his older brother Tony (Chris Grahamson) and their father (Deka Walmsley) participate in the demonstrations.At the same time, the older man, convinced that Billy, like him and Tony, will become a miner, also in accordance with the family tradition, signs him up for boxing training.The boy doesn't feel like fighting, but he discovers that classical dance lessons are held in the same building.He is encouraged to participate by his friend, Debbie (Demi Lee), the daughter of Mrs. Wilkinson (Ruthie Henshall), who runs the classes.The woman quickly notices that Billy has great talent, and he finds great pleasure in training ballet.However, the problem is the boy's father.When he learns about Billy's passion, he goes crazy.A musical adapted to the screen, which was in turn based on the famous film by Stephen Daldry from 2000.The play, with music by Elton John and libretto by Lee Hall, premiered at the Victoria Palace Theater in the West End.Then it was exhibited with great success in many countries.

programme.title: E Poi Si Vede
programme.desc: Three friends compete for an attractive job at the city hall.Federico relies on his father's connections, Fabrizio feels that he is born for this job, and Luca is always lucky.

programme.title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Ten years have passed since a virus wiped out almost the entire human race.The metropolises were deserted and civilization came to an end.Another intelligent species took over the world - genetically modified monkeys.They create their own world with a specific hierarchy.Caesar, a human-raised male who led the apes to revolution, is the leader of the pack.He was one of the few who experienced both evil and good from people.He hadn't seen a human for two years and thought the species was extinct.However, he is wrong.One day it turns out that in the ruins of San Francisco there lives a colony of people immune to the virus, led by a former policeman.Confrontation between both sides is inevitable.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy's First Marriage
programme.desc: 1990s.Young married couple Georgie Cooper (Montana Jordan) and Mandy McAllister (Emily Osment) living in Texas take care of their several-month-old daughter CeeCee.Para mieszka z rodzicami kobiety, Audrey (Rachel Bay Jones) i Jimem (Will Sasso), oraz jej młodszym bratem Connorem (Dougie Baldwin).Every day, young parents face the challenges of adulthood, relationship life and parenthood.The third television series in the series "The Big Bang Theory", a direct continuation of "Young Sheldon".

programme.title: DJ Ahmet
programme.desc: In the Macedonian village of Yuruk, the inhabitants live in accordance with tradition.Young people quickly start families and go on their own.15-year-old Ahmet (Arif Jakup) usually looks after sheep and takes care of his younger brother, but he loves electronic music and would like to become a DJ.To the dismay of his father and the conservative community, he equips his tractor with a sound system.His path crosses with a fellow dancer, Aya, who also dreams of a different life.The girl will soon get married according to her parents' decision.Together they decide to organize a party - as a rebellious act of freedom and self-expression.The feature debut of a creator from North Macedonia, who turned out to be one of the winners of Sundance in 2025.It's a touching story about growing up in a place where techno and tradition do not go hand in hand.

programme.title: The Madagascar Penguins in a Christmas Caper
programme.desc: The action of the film is set before the events of the film "Madagascar".The animals at the New York Zoo are getting ready for Christmas.When it's time to celebrate, Skipper, Kowalski and Rico notice that Private is not with them.The penguin wanted to find a gift for his friend, Ted, who was going to spend Christmas alone.Due to an unfortunate turn of events, instead of getting the gift, Private was bought itself.His friends come to his rescue.In the Polish language version, the characters were voiced by, among others:Grzegorz Pawlak, Jacek Lenartowicz, Tomasz Steciuk and Janusz Zadura.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: The colorful flock of flightless birds and the cunning green pigs continue to quarrel and cannot stand each other's presence.Unexpectedly, however, they have to call a truce and forget about their disagreements.Their islands are threatened by a completely new enemy, whom they can only defeat by fighting side by side.Red, Bomba, Chuck and his sister Silver get along with Leonard and his crew.The second film inspired by a popular smartphone game.In the Polish language version, the voices were: Jacek Bończyk (Red), Agnieszka Mrozińska (Silver), Janusz Zadura (Chuck), Piotr Bąk (Bomba), Paweł Szczęsny (Leonard).

programme.title: A Royal Christmas Ballet
programme.desc: Former ballet dancer Carrie (Brittany Underwood) is to prepare a performance of "The Nutcracker" on the occasion of a visit from a foreign delegation.While working on the play, she becomes involved in an affair.

programme.title: The Last Showgirl
programme.desc: After thirty years, dancer Shelly Gardner (Pamela Anderson) ends her career.For decades, she performed in a strip revue in Las Vegas, which was inspired by French burlesque.The stage, costumes and music are her passion, for which she sacrificed her family life and relationship with her daughter, Hannah (Billie Lourd).She shared her knowledge and experience with beginner friends Marianne (Brenda Song) and Jodie (Kiernan Shipka).Pewnego dnia jednak producent Eddie (Dave Bautista) ogłasza, że show zdjęto z afisza.Devastated, Shelly must re-plan her future.A similar fate will befall her friend Annette (Jamie Lee Curtis), a dealer at an arcade.Golden Globe for Pamela Anderson.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Atlanta.Baby lost his parents in an accident.He himself suffered serious injuries.The boy became involved in cooperation with criminals after he tried to steal a car belonging to the cunning Doc.Since then, he has been in the gangster's employ.His task is seemingly simple - he is to take the team of thieves away from the scene of the robbery as quickly as possible.One day, the boy meets his dream girl - Deborah.He knows perfectly well that there is no place for feelings in illegal business.So he decides to break away from the underworld and start a normal life.However, it turns out that it will not be easy.The boss is not going to let a valuable driver go.She blackmails him into participating in another daring robbery.Not everything goes according to plan.
